_expectedConnectors._comment: Enable these in Settings -> Capabilities. They are user-level connectors, not bundled here, and carry no secrets in this plugin. Tokens/keys are read at runtime from /Users/vMac/.env via Desktop Commander.
_expectedConnectors.notion: Content (Help Center / blog source). Sections tracker is retired.
_expectedConnectors.cloudinary: Cloudinary Asset Management — source of truth for media (cloud dtmizxj1n).
_expectedConnectors.shopify: Admin/dev — products, collections, metaobjects, metafields, GraphQL.
_expectedConnectors.desktop-commander: Filesystem access beyond the workspace + ALL git operations (FUSE-safe).
